basic_details.job_title: Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online for 11 Dy Manager, Associate and More Posts
basic_details.short_information: Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited Recruitment 2026: Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited has released the official notification for 11 Dy Manager (Marketing), Associate, Executive posts, inviting applications from eligible candidates. This recruitment provides an excellent opportunity for candidates seeking government jobs.

age_limit.details: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details. Age Relaxation: Relaxation may be given to highly deserving candidates.

qualification.education_qualification: Graduation with full-time Master's Degree/ Executive MBA /Post Graduate Diploma (2-years duration) in Marketing, Graduate from an institution/university of repute
qualification.details: Dy Manager (Marketing): Graduation with full-time Master's Degree/ Executive MBA /Post Graduate Diploma (2-years duration) in Marketing discipline as major subject. Minimum 8 years' experience in marketing, with at least 3 years in a middle level position having proven success in a two-sided marketplace or platform business. Associate (Operation): Graduate from an institution/university of repute. Minimum 3 years' experience. Experience in ride hailing organisation will be given preference.

salary_details.dy manager (marketing): Approx Rs 14.50 LPA (HRA as per POP)

selection_process: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.
how_to_apply: Candidates who wish to apply for Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below.
Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

rows.sahakar_taxi_cooperative_limited: Graduation with full-time Master's Degree/ Executive MBA /Post Graduate Diploma (2-years duration) in Marketing, Graduate from an institution/university of repute

content_sections.heading: Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates should download and read the Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited Jobs 2026 notification PDF carefully to check vacancy details, eligibility, age limit, and application instructions. The notification also includes important dates and selection process details. The direct download link is available in the Important Links section below. Download Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.heading: Eligibility Criteria
content_sections.text: Dy Manager (Marketing): Graduation with full-time Master's Degree/ Executive MBA /Post Graduate Diploma (2-years duration) in Marketing discipline as major subject. Minimum 8 years' experience in marketing, with at least 3 years in a middle level position having proven success in a two-sided marketplace or platform business. Associate (Operation): Graduate from an institution/university of repute. Minimum 3 years' experience. Experience in ride hailing organisation will be given preference.

content_sections.heading: Age Limit
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for age limit details. Age Relaxation: Relaxation may be given to highly deserving candidates.

rows.salary: Approx Rs 14.50 LPA (HRA as per POP)

content_sections.heading: Selection Process
content_sections.text: Please refer to the official notification for selection process details.

content_sections.heading: How to Apply
content_sections.text: Candidates who wish to apply for Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited Various Posts Recruitment 2026 via email should follow the steps below. Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 21-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the organization name for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The recruitment is for Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited, inviting applications for various posts. This is an excellent opportunity for individuals seeking contractual government jobs in the specified field.

faq.question: Q2. What are the posts available in Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The available posts are Dy Manager (Marketing) and Associate (Operation). Candidates can apply for these positions based on their qualifications and experience as detailed in the official notification.

faq.question: Q3. How many total vacancies are there?
faq.answer: There are a total of 11 vacancies in this recruitment drive. This includes 1 post for Dy Manager (Marketing) and 10 posts for Associate (Operation) across different categories.

faq.question: Q4. What is the last date to apply for these posts?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application via email for Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited Recruitment 2026 is 21 July 2026. Candidates are advised to apply well in advance to avoid last-minute issues.

faq.question: Q5. What is the application mode for Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The application mode for these posts is Email. Candidates need to send their complete application along with all required documents to the official email address mentioned in the notification.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for these vacancies?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited Recruitment 2026. Candidates can apply without paying any fee.

faq.question: Q7. What are the educational qualifications required for Dy Manager (Marketing)?
faq.answer: For Dy Manager (Marketing), candidates need Graduation with a full-time Master's Degree/Executive MBA/Post Graduate Diploma (2-years duration) in Marketing. Relevant experience is also a key requirement for this position.

faq.question: Q8. What is the salary for the Associate (Operation) post?
faq.answer: The approximate salary for the Associate (Operation) post is Rs 5 LPA. The exact details regarding salary and other benefits will be as per the organization's policy and the official notification.

faq.question: Q9. Where is the job location for these posts?
faq.answer: The job location for these positions is New Delhi, Delhi, with the pincode 110016. Candidates should be prepared to work in this location if selected for the role.

faq.question: Q10. What is the official website for Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited?
faq.answer: The official website for Sahakar Taxi Cooperative Limited is www.bharattaxiapp.com. Candidates can visit this website for more information and updates regarding the organization and this recruitment.
